title: NRW route reopened after a round-one failure
verbatim: NRW failed Round 1 ... came back final ... VERY EARLY CO-CREATION
detail: A failed first round was followed by a return at the final stage, with very early co-creation between the team and NRW.

title: Literature review underpinned the unfolding project
verbatim: LITERATURE REVIEW - underpinned project as it unfolded
detail: The literature review fed multiple downstream outputs and supported the project as it developed.

title: Early co-creation shaped the research
verbatim: EARLY CO-CREATION
detail: Co-creation preceded and informed the formal Sprint period and the fieldwork design.

title: First workshop with NRW at Welsh Government
verbatim: 7th FEB 2025 - FIRST WORKSHOP WITH NRW @ WELSH GOVT.
detail: The first recorded workshop brought NRW and the research team together at Welsh Government.

title: Chance cafe encounter with Ceri Davies
verbatim: THE TEAM BUMPED INTO CERI DAVIES, NRW CHAIR, IN THE CAFE - 'instant saliency!'
detail: The chance encounter helped give the research early authority and legitimacy, and put the project on the NRW Chair's radar.

title: Abstract submission and conceptual framing development
verbatim: abstract submission & conceptual framing development
detail: Flowing from the literature review, an abstract was submitted while the project's conceptual framing developed.

title: Formal Sprint period begins
verbatim: JUNE 2025
detail: The boxed month marker on the wall chart: the formal start of the Sprint timeline.

title: Fieldwork 1
verbatim: FIELDWORK 1
detail: The first fieldwork phase, feeding the iterative findings cycle.

title: Iterative findings cycle
verbatim: iterative findings
detail: Findings looped back into the research design as fieldwork progressed.

title: Fieldwork 2
verbatim: FIELDWORK 2
detail: The second fieldwork phase, running into the autumn.

title: Early evidence fed into SoNaRR 'Bridges to the Future'
verbatim: SEP-DEC: SoNaRR 'BRIDGES TO THE FUTURE' - Sprint team fed in early evidence
detail: The Sprint team fed early evidence into NRW's SoNaRR future-focused work. Starred on the wall chart as a key moment.

title: Second analysis and the 'coping to hoping' reframing
verbatim: 2nd analysis - 'coping to hoping' framing
detail: The second analysis pass produced the 'coping to hoping' framing that carried through later outputs.

title: Conceptual framing fit, but didn't quite do enough
verbatim: reflected that sub conceptual framing fit, but didn't quite do enough
detail: A reflective note: the sub conceptual framing fitted the material but did not go far enough on its own.

title: Fieldwork 3
verbatim: FIELDWORK 3
detail: The third and final fieldwork phase, just before the survey launched.

title: Survey launched
verbatim: JANUARY: SURVEY LAUNCHED
detail: The survey went live, generating the evidence that later fed policy outputs.

title: Conversations about place-based, focussed and catchment approaches
verbatim: conversations about place based / focussed / catchment
detail: Framing conversations about what 'place-based' should mean ran alongside the survey.

title: First draft of policy brief
verbatim: FEB: FIRST DRAFT OF POLICY BRIEF
detail: The first draft of the policy brief was produced.

title: Policy brief drafted at IPBES-12 in Manchester
verbatim: FEB 2026: IPBES-12 ... Caitlin & Charlotte drafted policy brief while at IPBES in Manchester
detail: Caitlin and Charlotte drafted the policy brief while attending IPBES-12. Starred on the wall chart.

title: Final analysis
verbatim: final analysis
detail: The final analysis pass, feeding the synthesis of findings.

title: Scottish Government engagement opened
verbatim: Luke engaged with ScottishGov ... early conversations about ScottishGov with team ... met for initial meeting ... come from Luke's earlier networks 2024?
detail: Engagement with Scottish Government opened through Luke's earlier networks, moving from early conversations to an initial meeting.

title: Report refined through feedback
verbatim: Report was refined based on feedback - lots of paper iterations
detail: The report went through many iterations in response to feedback.

title: 'Hopeful' narrative helped findings travel
verbatim: 'hopeful' narrative helped early findings travel in ops teams
detail: The hopeful framing of early findings helped them circulate in operational teams.

title: Policy liaison through existing networks
verbatim: POLICY LIAISON ... Policy Liaison & existing networks helped with translating the brief to Scottish Govt. ... Policy brief iteratively refined based on feedback in Policy Liaison meetings
detail: Policy liaison meetings and existing networks translated the brief for different audiences and refined it iteratively.
actors: NRW; Scottish Government; Sprint team; Policy collaborators

title: Capacity constraint: NRW lacked resources
verbatim: NRW just lack of resources!
detail: A capacity note from the board: NRW's lack of resources constrained engagement.

title: Paper 1: drafting and redrafting
verbatim: MAR - Paper 1 draft ... Drafting + redrafting paper 1 - 2 months
detail: Paper 1 moved from first draft through two months of drafting and redrafting.

title: NRW became intellectual collaborators
verbatim: NRW as intellectual collaborators - conceptual framing & interpretation
detail: NRW moved beyond a stakeholder role into shaping conceptual framing and interpretation.

title: Meeting with Prys Davies
verbatim: Had meeting with Prys Davies
detail: A meeting with Prys Davies followed from the NRP Forum presentation.

title: NRP Executive Team meetings
verbatim: APRIL-MAY 2026: EXECUTIVE TEAM NRP MEETINGS
detail: The work reached NRP Executive Team meetings.
actors: NRP Executive Team; NRW; Sprint team

title: Knowledge sharing with Scottish Government
verbatim: APRIL-MAY: KNOWLEDGE SHARING WITH SCOTTISH GOVERNMENT
detail: The Scottish Government engagement matured into structured knowledge sharing.

title: Survey findings, synthesis and slides fed policy use
verbatim: early survey findings useful to quantifying AS / place-based work ... synthesis of findings ... designed slides ... survey outputs -> policy report evidence
detail: Early survey findings helped quantify Area Statements and place-based work; synthesis and designed slides turned survey outputs into policy report evidence.

title: Translating, drafting, redrafting: the core influence practice
verbatim: Translating, drafting, redrafting existing outputs
detail: The cloud on the wall chart naming the underlying practice: translating, drafting and redrafting existing outputs for each new audience.

title: Valleys workshop filming
verbatim: 22nd APRIL - Valleys workshop filming
detail: Filming at the Valleys workshop. Highlighted on the wall chart.

title: WG NRP Forum: Sprint team presented
verbatim: 23rd APRIL - WG NRP FORUM - Sprint team presented
detail: The Sprint team presented at the Welsh Government Natural Resources Policy Forum.
actors: Sprint team; Welsh Government; NRP Forum

title: Area Statements included in GP manifesto
verbatim: Area Statements included in GP manifesto
detail: Area Statements appeared in a party manifesto ('GP' as written on the board).

title: Place-based working became more salient
verbatim: Place-based working more salient post-election.
detail: The election outcome raised the salience of place-based working.

title: Live evidence base translated for short-term requests
verbatim: 'live' evidence base adapted & translated to short term evidence requests
detail: The live evidence base was adapted and translated to answer short-term evidence requests.

title: Short-term request: Exec Group policy briefing
verbatim: SHORT TERM REQUEST FOR EXEC GROUP POLICY BRIEFING
detail: A short-term request came in for a policy briefing for the Exec Group.

title: 'Impact Party'
verbatim: 'IMPACT PARTY' - 6th MAY
detail: The Impact Party marked the push of outputs into the policy window. Highlighted on the wall chart.

title: Senedd elections
verbatim: SENEDD ELECTIONS 7th MAY ... power & legitimacy
detail: The Senedd elections reshaped the policy landscape. Annotated on the board with 'power & legitimacy'.

title: Scottish slides formed an options evidence base
verbatim: Scottish slides formed evidence base for catchment / hybrid / etc. options menu
detail: The slides built for Scottish Government became the evidence base for a catchment, hybrid and other options menu.

title: Presented at RSA
verbatim: Presented at RSA - JUNE
detail: The work was presented at the RSA.

title: Area Statements 2.0 workshop
verbatim: AS 2.0 WORKSHOP - 5th JUNE
detail: The Area Statements 2.0 workshop. Starred on the wall chart as a key moment.

title: Final report and brief shared for feedback
verbatim: 8th JUNE - FINAL REPORT & BRIEF SHARED WITH NRW & WG FOR FEEDBACK
detail: The final report and brief went to NRW and Welsh Government for feedback.

title: Presented at POLLEN
verbatim: Presented at POLLEN - JULY
detail: The work was presented at the POLLEN conference.

title: Filming: Lake Vyrnwy and Radnorshire
verbatim: JULY - FILMING LAKE VYRNWY & RADNORSHIRE
detail: Filming took place at Lake Vyrnwy and in Radnorshire. Highlighted on the wall chart.

title: Pivot point: evidence earned a role in NRP decisions
verbatim: PIVOT POINTS: SoNaRR + survey + policy brief led to role in NRP meetings / board decisions -> e.g. voting for hybrid options for future of place-based policy rather than catchments
detail: The combination of SoNaRR input, the survey and the policy brief earned the work a role in NRP meetings and board decisions, including votes on hybrid options for the future of place-based policy.

title: Report complete
verbatim: 9th JULY - REPORT COMPLETE
detail: The report was completed, closing the Sprint timeline.
